design_philosophy: Fiverr meets Stripe & Apple. A frictionless, high-trust marketplace for elite video editors. The UI must feel like a secure, established financial/business tool rather than a generic gig board. The aggressive neon gradient is used as a functional 'laser pointer' to draw attention to high-value actions, verifications, and progress, standing out sharply against a sterile, high-contrast white/slate canvas.

logo_guidelines.usage_rules: The provided EditCol logo is white with a gradient 'O'. Because the app background is light (#FFFFFF / #F8FAFC), the logo MUST NOT be placed directly on the light background. It must be housed inside a dark container. Examples: 1) A dark navbar (bg-[#0A0A0A]), 2) A dark footer, 3) If placed on a white page, put the logo inside a pill or rounded rectangle with bg-gray-900. NEVER modify the logo's typography or colors.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#39FF14] to-[#DFFF00] text-gray-900 font-bold hover:brightness-110 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(57,255,20,0.3)] transition-all rounded-full px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-gray-900 text-white font-medium hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl cursor-pointer hover:border-[#39FF14] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(57,255,20,0.1)] transition-all
cards.dark_metric: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl text-white p-6

inputs.default: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#39FF14] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#39FF14] transition-all
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full border border-gray-800 (Use neon gradient for the checkmark icon)
badges.pro: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#39FF14] to-[#DFFF00] text-gray-900 text-xs font-bold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full shadow-sm
badges.top_rated: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-amber-100 text-amber-900 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full
badges.elite: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-[#39FF14] shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(57,255,20,0.2)]

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for large cards, rounded-xl for inputs, rounded-full for buttons and pills.

landing.nav: Dark navbar (bg-[#0A0A0A]) to contrast the white logo, sticky with backdrop-blur. Links in white, primary CTA in neon gradient.
landing.hero: Stark white background. Massive Outfit typography (H1). Subtle gray grid pattern overlay. Trust markers (e.g., 'Trusted by 10k+ creators'). Search bar front and center.
landing.featured_editors: Bento grid of editor cards. Each card has a video thumbnail (image), editor avatar, name, badges, and starting price.

browse_editors.layout: 2-column layout. Left sidebar (25%) for deep filters (Skills, Software, Badges, Price, Delivery Time). Right side (75%) for grid of editor cards.
browse_editors.cards: Image heavy. Hovering on a card should reveal a 'Play' icon or subtle zoom to imply video.

editor_profile.layout: Left column (30%): Sticky profile card, avatar, badges, 'Message Editor' and 'Hire For Project' buttons (Neon), response rate, trust score panel. Right column (70%): Video portfolio bento grid, About section, detailed Reviews with verified purchase tags.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left side: dark background with abstract 3D video editing shapes or high-quality studio image. Right side: stark white form container. Email + Phone OTP flow with neon gradient progress bar.

dashboards.layout: Sidebar navigation (dark bg-[#0A0A0A] to hold logo). Main content area off-white (#F8FAFC).
dashboards.components: Metric cards with clean data charts. Tables for projects and messages. Use the neon gradient for status indicators (e.g., 'In Progress').

chat.layout: Full height. Left pane: recent conversations. Right pane: active chat. Bubbles should be gray-100 (received) and gray-900 (sent). Use neon gradient for 'Send' button or active typing indicator.
chat.features: Attachment buttons for video files, read receipts (small checkmarks).

project_request_form.layout: Multi-step wizard. Neon gradient progress bar at the top. Large, clear inputs for project scope, budget, and references.

admin.layout: Dense, high-contrast data tables. Red accents for scam/report flags. Dedicated queues for profile verification (approving Pro/Elite badges).

icons.style: Stroke width 2, clean, unstyled unless indicating active state (use neon gradient stroke for active).

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hire-editor-button').

images.description: Cozy workspace featuring a computer setup for video editing, perfect for creative hero sections.
Black laptop running professional video editing software. Good for editor portfolio mockups.
Creative agency team collaborating. Good for 'About Us' or 'Pro Teams' section.
